name: GRPO + GR
summary: This research explores explicit gradient regularization applied during GRPO training for large language models, aimed at improving convergence and reducing catastrophic forgetting.

name: Power Sampling
description: Replicating RL's policy sharpening at inference
summary: Inference time sampling technique using a power distribution and MCMC that tries to match the effects of RL on the model's policy.

name: Self-Distillation Fine-Tuning
description: Performing SDFT on domain specific knowledge
summary: Investigating the efficacy of SDFT on OOD tasks - specifically on corporate specific information - and comparing them against Experiential RL.

name: GradMem
description: Learning to write context into memory at inference time
summary: An alternate form of memory compressino that involves test-time Gradient Descent to continually 'bake in' knowledge into the model.
